---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an issue with tool documentation
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the issue

A clear description of what the problem is.

## Which tool is affected?

Tool name and link to the documentation page.

## What is wrong?

- [ ] Incorrect command
- [ ] Outdated information
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Other

## Expected behavior

What you expected to see.

## Actual behavior

What you actually saw.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain.

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem.
